# Daily Report тАФ 2026-06-10

## Task Completed
Added `list_notifications` tool targeting the `sysevent_email_log` table.
New file `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/notification_tools.py` implements the tool with
filters for delivery state, notification type (LIKE), recipient email (LIKE),
source record sys_id, and creation date range (created_after/created_before).
Responses include full pagination (has_more/next_offset). Reference fields
(target) are normalised to display values. Registered in service_desk,
system_administrator, and full tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1526
- Coverage: 92%
- notification_tools.py: 97% coverage
- All passing: yes

## Security
Third-party system packages (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) have known CVEs тАФ
not introduced by this change. No vulnerabilities in project code.
